Skill: UX Emotional + Stakeholder Communication
Description: Especialista in design emocional (Walter) e articulacao of decisoes of design (Greever). Use to strengthen emotional connection with users and defend decisions of design with stakeholders of forma objetiva. Base operacional: # Playbook  ## Sources - Designing for Emotion — Aarron Walter - Articulating Design Decisions — Tom Greever
Triggers: emotional design, stakeholder communication, design decisions, articulating design, ux presentation
Stack: Next.js 15+ App Router; React 19+; TanStack Query; shadcn/ui + Tailwind v4; Monorepo (apps + packages)
Workflow:
- 1. Evaluate design on the three emotional levels (visceral, behavioral, reflective).
- 2. Structure proposal with problem, persona, metric, trade-off and plan of validation.
- 3. Adaptar linguagem by audiencia (executivo, engenharia, product, marketing).
- 4. Comparar alternativas lado a lado with o que foi descartado e by que.
- 5. Fechar with decisao clara e proximo teste.
Output Contract:
- Avaliacao of design by nivel emocional.
- Proposta estruturada with trade-offs explicitos.
- Script adaptado by audiencia of stakeholder.
- Validation plan and next step.
